metadata.title: Who Makes the Best? Guide
metadata.order_link_text: Want to know how to order these watches?  Click here: https://www.reddit.com/r/RepTime/wiki/index/
metadata.description: This guide is directionally correct, but there are nuances to keep in mind.  One factory might have a better case shape but the other one a better crystal.  These are not discussed here and what is listed here as "best" is an educated opinion that is a general consensus.  For in-depth discussion visit r/reptime or the forums!
metadata.update_notes:
Rolex:
Swapped APSF as best over QF for a few Daytona Models.  
Daydates: Added two lines per u/emotional-damage-995 suggestions (thank you!) for 40mm Premium and 40mm Mid Tier.
Daytona: I need to rework the section on the next update I think.  Added a line for 116520 for 3CF as NWBIG.
Daytona: Added ARF as superior to VSF for Gold models weighted.
Removed all mentions of Clean Factory (sad day).
Added VF as super rep for Datejust 41
Explorer II: Removed Clean as best, replaced with ARF as Super Rep
Explorer I 39mm: Removed Clean, replaced with VF as Super Rep
126610 Sub: Added ARF as Super Rep
Patek:
Added 3KF for 6102 Celestial
Added DDF for 5167 and 5168 Aquanaut as top choice Super Rep
AP:
15500: split into two sections for free sprung vs standard.  APSF has free sprung.  Despite the movement improvements, the dial leaves this as not quite NWBIG, just Super Rep.
15510: Added Top Factory as best.
26240 and 24260: Added DDF as second best option over TOP due to DD movement.  APSF still best choice.
IWC
Added Pilot Chronograph from APSF as Super Rep due to clone movement
Added Portugieser Chrono from APSF as Super Rep due to clone movement
Breitling
Added: OF Breitling Endurance Pro has gen E10.212 movement featuring 1/10th seconds
Tudor
Added Pelagos Ultra 43mm ZF with A2824 as Super Rep
Added Black Bay Pro GMT by ZF with VR3186 as Super Rep

legend.Super Rep: Super Rep, likely with comments (aka Good but not entirely perfect)

recommendations.factory: HOW DO I ORDER THESE WATCHES???
Want to know how to order these watches?  Click here: https://www.reddit.com/r/RepTime/wiki/index/

variants.model_number: 216570 White and Black Dial (date window in wrong position)
All models, best case shape, dial
36mm, most dial variants (NB: VSF movement has two crown positions instead of one)
36mm, all other dial variants not by VSF

notes.text: Note: There are differences in Clean*, QF and BTF, and they not only consistently update these, but some models BTF or QF are better than Clean* and vice versa.  Compare the rep to gen photos and determine who comes closest in your mind, or read reptime and/or RWI.

variants.model_number: 5812 All dial variants (no good clone yet)

model_families.family: Note: No tourbillons from the front exist for Patek (in general).
